rationale: Educ. Code §39.0381 governs auditing of state assessment instrument contracts. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 39.0381. AUDITING AND MONITORING PERFORMANCE UNDER CONTRACTS FOR ASSESSMENT INSTRUMENTS.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education assessment contract auditing provision.
